name: Honey Roasted Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place peanuts in a bowl.
3. Heat butter and honey together until melted.
4. Toss the peanuts with the butter and honey mixture.
5. Spread the peanuts on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the peanuts are golden brown.
Makes: 2 cups
